evals.prompt: Update my pattern files from these metadata-enriched transcriptions. Put the pattern notes in ../scratch/update-patterns/
evals.expected_output: Pattern markdown files are created or updated with managed blocks, source notes, evidence, summaries, why-it-matters lines, and actions.
files: ../scratch/generate-metadata/Crush on Lebanese Girl and Unhealthy Expectations.md

evals.prompt: Take these productivity notes and update the recurring patterns, open problems, and experiments files.
evals.expected_output: Relevant pattern files are updated using generated metadata, with similar entries merged and distinct entries kept separate.

evals.prompt: Use the generated metadata from these notes to update People Mentioned and Projects Mentioned.
evals.expected_output: People and project index files are updated with source-backed entries and practical tracking actions.
